description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in historical or fantasy-inspired attire, featuring a segmented tunic with vertical color blocks and a high collar. The figure wears a wide-brimmed, rounded helmet and has protective gear on the shoulders and forearms, suggesting a lightly armored appearance. The tunic extends to the knees and is belted at the waist, with visible seams and fabric texture. The arms and legs are covered, with the lower legs protected by tall, fitted boots that have reinforced sections. The face is mostly obscured by the helmet's brim and shadow, giving the figure a mysterious or guarded demeanor. The overall look is reminiscent of a medieval or renaissance city guard or soldier, suitable for urban patrols or ceremonial duties.
description: A male adult in historical or fantasy-style segmented tunic and helmet, with protective boots and arm guards, evoking a city guard or soldier.
description_view_0: Front view shows the segmented tunic, high collar, helmet, and symmetrical arm and leg protection.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, the layered tunic, and the fitted boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the tunic with vertical color blocks and the back of the helmet and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the tunic's side seam and the arm and leg protection.
attribute_clothing_type: segmented tunic with high collar, protective arm and leg gear, wide-brimmed helmet
